name: NoteFlow
shortDescription: Minimalist markdown note-taking with real-time preview and cloud sync.
fullDescription: NoteFlow is a focus-first note-taking app powered by markdown. Write in a clean distraction-free editor, see your formatting render in real-time, and keep everything synced across devices. Supports tagging, search, and one-click export to PDF or HTML.

name: PaletteAI
shortDescription: Generate stunning color palettes from a single text prompt using AI.
fullDescription: Type a mood, a scene, or an emotion — PaletteAI turns it into a beautiful 5-colour palette instantly. Export to CSS variables, Tailwind config, or Figma tokens. Perfect for designers who need inspiration fast.

name: Spendwise
shortDescription: Lightweight expense tracker with reports. No account required.
fullDescription: Spendwise lets you log income and expenses by category, view monthly breakdowns with charts, and export everything to CSV. 100% local — your data stays in your browser. No login, no server.

name: StudyPulse
shortDescription: Pomodoro timer with session tracking, ambient sounds, and weekly stats.
fullDescription: StudyPulse keeps you in flow with customisable Pomodoro intervals, 8 hand-picked ambient soundscapes, and a weekly heat-map of your study sessions. Set goals, track streaks, and build a consistent study habit.

name: WeatherLens
shortDescription: Beautiful weather app with animated conditions and 7-day forecast.
fullDescription: WeatherLens wraps real-time weather data in a beautifully animated interface. See current conditions, an hourly graph, 7-day outlook, UV index, and air quality — all in one glance. Dark mode included.

name: TypeForge
shortDescription: Adaptive typing trainer with WPM analytics and leaderboard.
fullDescription: TypeForge measures your typing speed and accuracy across 50+ curated word sets, with adaptive difficulty that grows as you improve. Track WPM, accuracy, and personal records. Compete on the global leaderboard.
